Theme Lab

Executive Editorial Warm premium tone, high trust, boardroom readability. Operator Blueprint Cool analytical feel, technical clarity, execution-first. Strategic Horizon Forward-looking narrative style with strong visual warmth.

CTO Return Criteria

  • Can skim key ideas in under 90 seconds.
  • Every post has one concrete framework or decision model.
  • Visual tone feels credible, calm, and non-gimmicky.
  • Navigation makes it obvious what to read next.
